emailTemplateInvoice: Defines named email templates used for invoice dispatch, including subject, BCC, and body text. Related to company and location.
email_events: Stores raw AWS SES delivery event payloads (bounces, opens, complaints) keyed by AWS message ID. Related to email.
EmployeePositionsJobTypes: Maps job types to employee positions within a company/location. Related to cmEmployeePositions.
EngageChat: Stores direct messages between users in the Engage client portal. Related to EngageFamily.
EngageFamily: Stores family member accounts for the Engage portal with encrypted credentials and contact details. Related to EngageFamilyLinks.
EngageFamilyLinks: Links family portal accounts to specific clients with activation codes and permission levels. Related to EngageFamily and client.
EngageGallery: Stores photo gallery entries for clients in the Engage portal with slideshow and tag support. Related to client and EngagePictures.
EngageGoal: Defines named goals assigned to clients in the Engage portal, with an optional picture link. Referenced by EngageGoalComplete and EngageGoalRecurr.
EngageGoalComplete: Records goal completion events for clients. Related to client and EngageGoal.
EngageGoalRecurr: Defines recurring goal schedules for clients in the Engage portal. Related to client and EngageGoal.
EngageLogs: Logs page visit events for clients using the Engage portal. Related to client.
EngageNotifications: Stores notifications shown to family members about client activity in the Engage portal. Related to client and EngageFamily.
EngagePhone: Stores quick-dial phone contacts for clients in the Engage portal with optional photo. Related to client.
EngagePictures: Stores raw image blobs used throughout the Engage portal. Referenced by EngageGallery.
EngagePopup: Stores popup note preferences for clients in the Engage portal. Related to client.
EngagePrefCategories: Stores custom interest/preference categories for clients or family members in the Engage portal. Related to client and EngageFamily.
EngagePreferences: Stores client interest preference flags (health, music, sport, etc.) for content personalisation in the Engage portal. Related to client.
EngageQuestions: Defines daily wellness check-in questions shown to clients in the Engage portal, with answer options and scheduling. Related to client.
EngageWellness: Records client responses to wellness check-in questions in the Engage portal. Related to client and EngageQuestions.
equipment: Records equipment items assigned to clients with service dates. Related to client.
equipmentType: Lookup table of equipment type names per company/location. Referenced by equipment.
eventAlert: Records triggered alert events linked to specific task or medication assignments for clients. Related to client and carer.
eventAlertSetup: Configures which carers should be notified when a specific task or medication alert fires for a client or area. Related to client and carer.
expenses: Legacy table storing basic expense records for clients with description, amount, and purpose. Related to client.
exportButtonLog: Logs export button click events with the export and page name for audit and analytics. Related to company and location.
externalLinks: Defines short codes mapping to internal pages for external link routing. Standalone routing table.
externalLinksProfile: Stores named external link configurations per client and company/location. Related to client.
failedAttemptLog: Logs failed and successful login attempts by username and IP address, including lockout status. Standalone security log.
failed_jobs: Laravel queue table for storing failed background job payloads and exceptions. Standalone infrastructure table.
familyAppLevels: Defines family portal permission profiles controlling which features (schedule, medication, chat, etc.) are visible to family members. Referenced by familyAppMemberLevel.
familyAppMemberLevel: Assigns a family portal permission level to a specific family member. Related to cmFamily and familyAppLevels.
familyPhotos: Stores photo records shared with family members for a client, with titles and uploader tracking. Related to client, company, and location.
fileCabinet: Stores named file cabinet entries with tags, folder placement, and carer access flags. Related to fileUpload.
fileCabinetAccess: Records which carers have been granted access to specific file cabinet files, with view tracking. Related to carer and fileCabinet.
fileCabinetFolder: Defines the folder hierarchy within the file cabinet, with carer access and area scope. Referenced by fileCabinet.
fileCabinetHistory: Audit log of file cabinet actions (e.g. downloads) per user and file. Related to fileCabinet.
fileCabinetTags: Lookup table of named tags for file cabinet entries. Referenced by fileCabinet.
fileUpload: Stores raw uploaded file blobs for general use across the platform. Referenced by many tables that store file metadata separately.
FileUpload: Stores document files uploaded for specific clients or carers with name, type, and tag metadata. Related to client and carer.
financeAnalisysCSV: Stores saved finance analysis CSV export configurations per company/location. Related to company and location.
financeUpdateRecord: Logs pay or billing scale percentage increase events with effective dates per company/location. Related to company and location.
firstPageImages: Stores image records (header or watermark) used on the system first/login page per company/location. Related to firstPageSettings.
firstPageSettings: Configures the first/login page layout including header image, watermark, body text, and branch targeting. Related to firstPageImages, company, and location.
fluidBalanceDetails: Stores fluid balance monitoring configuration for clients, including restrictions, goals, and hourly target ranges. Related to client.
fluidIntakes: Records fluid intake measurements for clients over time with type, amount, and time window. Related to client.
fluidOutputs: Records fluid output measurements for clients over time with type, amount, and description. Related to client.
form: Legacy form template table linking ordered questions to a named survey. Referenced by formTaken.
formAnswer: Defines answer options for legacy form questions with scoring. Related to formQuestion.
formBoxes: Defines named display boxes used to group form questions on a client profile, with app visibility flags. Related to client and formQuestionBoxes.
formInfo: Stores additional informational text sections within a legacy form. Related to form.
formName: Legacy form name/code lookup table defining available forms per company/location. Standalone lookup.
formPopupSubmissions: Tracks which users have submitted a specific popup plan form, preventing repeat displays. Related to carer.
formQuestion: Defines legacy form questions with up to five answer options. Referenced by formTaken.
formQuestionBoxes: Assigns form questions to display boxes with ordering. Related to formQuestion and formBoxes.
formTaken: Records legacy form submission instances for clients with answers and comments. Related to client.
futureStatusChange: Legacy table for scheduling client status/state transitions on future dates. Related to client.
gcm_blacklist: Stores blacklisted GCM (push notification) registration IDs. Standalone mobile infrastructure table.
gcm_offline: Queues offline GCM push notification messages. Standalone mobile infrastructure table.
gcm_users: Stores GCM device registration IDs for carers to enable push notifications. Related to carer.
gender: Lookup table of named gender options with title prefix per company/location. Referenced by client and carer profiles.
goal: Legacy lookup table of goal names with optional picture links. Referenced by goalRecurr.
goalActions: Records named actions associated with a client goal, including responsible person, timescale, and completion tracking. Related to clientGoals and client.
goalActionsHistory: Audit history of changes to goal action records, preserving prior values on each update. Related to goalActions and client.
goalActionSnapShot: Stores snapshots of goal action states linked to goal history entries. Related to goalHistory and goalActions.
goalComment: Stores comments on client goals or action history entries. Related to client and goalActions.
goalHistory: Records goal review history entries including progress, theme, and tag at a point in time. Related to clientGoals and client.
goalRecurr: Defines recurring goal tracking schedules for clients. Related to client and goal.
goalsSectionPRSB: Stores PRSB-format care plan goal entries for clients, including importance level and need reference. Related to careplanTakenPRSB and client.
goalTag: Defines named tags for goals, linked to a theme. Referenced by clientGoals and goalHistory.
goalTheme: Defines named themes used to categorise goals per company/location. Referenced by clientGoals, goalTag, and goalHistory.
govClientAddress: Stores multiple address records for clients with address type and default flag. Related to client.
govClientContact: Stores structured contact method preferences for clients including phone, email, and other contact details. Related to client.
govClientDetails: Stores extended government and demographic profile fields for clients including identifiers, diversity, language, and voting details. Related to client.
govClientEmail: Stores multiple typed email addresses for clients. Related to client.
govClientTelephone: Stores multiple typed telephone numbers for clients. Related to client.
govPersonalContacts: Links personal contacts to clients with relationship type and FHIR-compatible relationship codes. Related to client and contacts.
govProfessionalContacts: Links professional contacts (GPs, specialists, key workers) to clients with role and team details. Related to client and contacts.
gpc_configurations: Stores GP Connect integration configuration per company, including ODS code and ASID. Related to company.
groups: Defines named groups that can be linked to clients or carers with address and area. Related to client and carer.
hasteeHalesConfiguration: Stores Hastee/Hales payroll integration configuration per company/location/branch. Related to company.
hasteeImport: Stores imported Hastee payroll records linking carers and timesheets to transaction values. Related to carer.
help: Stores legacy help article titles, details, and tags for in-app help content. Referenced by helpSlides.
helpSlides: Stores image slide attachments for help articles. Related to help.
holidayCalculations: Stores the current holiday entitlement and usage summary for each carer. Related to carer.
holidayEventsRemoved: Logs scheduled visit events that were removed when a carer went on leave. Related to carer and client.
holidayEventType: Defines named leave event types (sick, annual, etc.) with Bradford factor and accrual flags. Referenced by holidays and cmHolidayRequests.
holidayNotifications: Records notification events sent to carers regarding holiday record changes. Related to holidays and carer.
holidayPayments: Records individual holiday pay payment entries for carers against specific leave records, with payroll lock support. Related to carer and holidays.
holidays: Records approved carer leave/holiday entries with dates, pay, type, and payroll lock status. Related to carer.
holidaysPending: Staging table for carer leave entries awaiting approval, mirroring the holidays table structure. Related to carer.
holidaysStartingBalance: Records opening holiday balance adjustments for carers at the start of a leave year. Related to carer.
hours: Legacy table storing allocated care hours per client and job type. Related to client.
hr: Stores HR document files (contracts, certificates) for carers with expiry dates. Related to carer.
hrtype: Legacy lookup table of HR document type names per company. Referenced by hr.
hseLtiConditions: Lookup table of HSE Long-Term Illness qualifying conditions. Referenced by clientIreIdentifiers.
hubspot_mappings: Maps HubSpot CRM entity IDs to OneTouch internal IDs for synchronisation. Standalone integration table.
idPrefix: Defines named ID prefix configurations for client or carer numbering schemes. Referenced by clientDetails and carer.
id_mappings_kinetic: Maps source record IDs from the Kinetic system to OneTouch destination IDs for data migration. Standalone migration table.
id_mappings_rlo: Maps source record IDs from the RLO system to OneTouch destination IDs for data migration. Standalone migration table.
id_mappings_sdw: Maps source record IDs from the SDW system to OneTouch destination IDs for data migration. Standalone migration table.
